answers: Microbiology = study of microscopic organisms: bacteria, viruses, fungi, protozoa. Some cause disease, many are beneficial.
Types: bacteria (prokaryotes), viruses (need host), fungi (yeast, mold), protozoa (single-celled), algae.
Applications: medicine (antibiotics), food (fermentation), agriculture (soil bacteria), environment (bioremediation).
Fun fact: your body has roughly equal numbers of bacterial cells as human cells. Your gut microbiome is crucial for health.
